requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to the Dutch grid must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), adopted in the Netherlands as NEN-EN 50549-1/-2, which specify requirements for generating plants connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. Dutch DSOs (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) apply the Netherlands grid codes (Netcode elektriciteit) overseen by ACM, while TenneT, as transmission system operator, sets requirements at transmission level. At EU level, Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) sets binding requirements for power-generating modules above the thresholds defined by the Netherlands, covering fault ride-through, frequency response, and reactive power exchange.
summary.zh: 接入荷兰电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准（荷兰采用为NEN-EN 50549-1/-2），规定了并联接入公共配电网的发电装置的电压/频率穿越、无功功率能力、孤岛保护及重新并网要求。荷兰配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）执行由ACM监管的荷兰电网规程（Netcode elektriciteit），而作为输电系统运营商的TenneT在输电层面设定要求。欧盟层面，欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631（发电机要求，RfG）对超过荷兰规定阈值的发电模块设定了具有约束力的故障穿越、频率响应和无功功率交换要求。
summary.zht: 接入荷蘭電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準（荷蘭採用為NEN-EN 50549-1/-2），規定了並聯接入公共配電網的發電裝置的電壓／頻率穿越、無功功率能力、孤島保護及重新並網要求。荷蘭配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）執行由ACM監管的荷蘭電網規程（Netcode elektriciteit），而作為輸電系統運營商的TenneT在輸電層面設定要求。歐盟層面，歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求，RfG）對超過荷蘭規定閾值的發電模組設定了具有約束力的故障穿越、頻率響應和無功功率交換要求。

standards_or_laws: Netcode elektriciteit (Netherlands grid code, overseen by ACM)
TenneT grid connection requirements (transmission system operator)

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Power Station Connected to Power System) is sometimes referenced for inverter grid-connection behaviour. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），规定了PCS的电气性能、并网保护、孤岛检测及通信接口要求。2023年修订版将交流输出电压上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次调频要求，并更新了产品分类。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定》有时也被参考用于逆变器并网行为。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），規定了PCS的電氣性能、並網保護、孤島檢測及通信接口要求。2023年修訂版將交流輸出電壓上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次調頻要求，並更新了產品分類。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定》有時亦被參考用於逆變器並網行為。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — current supersession status not publicly confirmable; verify with State Grid or SAC for any post-2020 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to NEN-EN 50549-1/-2 or the Netherlands grid codes for Dutch market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory (accredited under EA, e.g. RvA in the Netherlands), and must satisfy the Netcode elektriciteit and DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) / TenneT requirements. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) is directly applicable law in the Netherlands; Chinese type-test reports against GB/T 34120 are not substitutable. Key technical gaps include different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles, reactive power Q(U) curves, reconnection delay settings, and communication protocol requirements (IEC 61850 or DSO-specific vs. Chinese Modbus/CAN conventions).
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被荷兰市场认可为NEN-EN 50549-1/-2或荷兰电网规程的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室（经EA认可，如荷兰RvA）重新测试并取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2认证，并须满足Netcode elektriciteit及配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）/TenneT的要求。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631在荷兰具有直接法律效力，依据GB/T 34120出具的中国型式试验报告不可替代。主要技术差距包括：电压/频率穿越曲线不同、无功功率Q(U)曲线不同、重新并网延迟设置不同，以及通信协议要求不同（IEC 61850或配电运营商专有协议对比中国Modbus/CAN惯例）。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被荷蘭市場認可為NEN-EN 50549-1/-2或荷蘭電網規程的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室（經EA認可，如荷蘭RvA）重新測試並取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2認證，並須滿足Netcode elektriciteit及配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）/TenneT的要求。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631在荷蘭具有直接法律效力，依據GB/T 34120出具的中國型式試驗報告不可替代。主要技術差距包括：電壓／頻率穿越曲線不同、無功功率Q(U)曲線不同、重新並網延遲設置不同，以及通信協議要求不同（IEC 61850或配電運營商專有協議對比中國Modbus/CAN慣例）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NEN-EN 50549-1/-2 are the Netherlands adoptions of harmonised standards supporting the Low Voltage Directive and the Netherlands grid codes; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding EU law. The Netcode elektriciteit and DSO/TenneT connection requirements are mandatory for grid connection approval in the Netherlands.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules. The recommended classification has not changed in the 2023 edition.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for Netherlands grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 and compliance with the Netcode elektriciteit and DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) / TenneT requirements are required before connecting to the Dutch grid. Engage an accredited EU test laboratory (e.g. RvA-accredited) early in the product development cycle.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合荷兰并网要求。在接入荷兰电网之前，须完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及Netcode elektriciteit和配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）/TenneT要求的完整重新测试。建议在产品开发周期早期联系经认可的欧盟检测实验室（如经RvA认可）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合荷蘭並網要求。在接入荷蘭電網之前，須完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及Netcode elektriciteit和配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）/TenneT要求的完整重新測試。建議在產品開發週期早期聯繫經認可的歐盟檢測實驗室（如經RvA認可）。
